authorization_scope: offline fixture planning only for attended DevHub read-only live-dry-run plan

authorization_prerequisites.reviewer_action: Confirm that attended DevHub read-only review remains blocked from live access, authentication state, browser artifacts, private values, and official actions.

attestations.statement: This fixture authorizes only offline plan construction and does not open or access live DevHub.
This fixture does not create, read, persist, or commit credentials, cookies, storage state, MFA artifacts, or private session files.
This fixture does not create, store, or commit screenshots, traces, HAR files, browser profiles, downloads, or raw authenticated output.
This fixture does not submit, certify, upload, pay, schedule, cancel, change account settings, or otherwise take official action.
